Technical review.recommended_route: Begin with a focused technical review.

Website and workflow upgrade.recommended_route: Start with the website, enquiry path, and connected workflow.

Automation project.recommended_route: Map the repeated work and define the smallest useful automation release.

Internal system.recommended_route: Map the current operation and define the smallest useful internal system.

Controlled AI assistant.recommended_route: Define the approved knowledge, boundaries, and fallback behaviour.

Product / SaaS build.recommended_route: Define a deliberate first release around the core user journey.
